name: chart/candlestick
description: OHLC financial chart — each period a high–low wick and an open↔close body, coloured up/down.

meta.name: Candlestick
meta.description: OHLC financial chart — each period a high–low wick and an open↔close body, coloured up/down.

props.name: data
props.description: One candle per period: { t, open, high, low, close, volume? }.

props.name: yTicks
props.description: Approximate number of ticks on the y-axis.

props.name: volume
props.description: Render volume bars beneath the candles.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: annotations
props.description: Reference lines/bands/markers over the plot (e.g. a last-price rule).

props.name: brush
props.description: Keyboard-operable Brush below the plot to subset the candles to a window.

props.name: dataZoom
props.description: DataZoom slider below the plot — a Brush whose body also pans the window.

props.name: zoom
props.description: In-plot wheel/drag/keyboard zoom-pan (+/-/0) over the candle index window.

props.name: syncId
props.description: Connect charts sharing this id — they mirror the zoom window.

props.name: tooltipMode
props.description: item (nearest candle) or axis (crosshair + OHLC at the hovered x).

examples.title: OHLC price series
examples.code:
import { Candlestick } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Candlestick
  title="ACME daily"
  tooltip
  data={[
    { t: 'Mon', open: 10, high: 14, low: 9, close: 13 },
    { t: 'Tue', open: 13, high: 15, low: 11, close: 11 },
    { t: 'Wed', open: 11, high: 12, low: 8, close: 9 },
  ]}
/>

examples.title: Zoomable with a last-price rule
examples.code:
<Candlestick
  title="ACME daily"
  data={candles}
  volume
  zoom
  dataZoom
  tooltipMode="axis"
  annotations={[{ kind: 'line', axis: 'y', value: lastClose, label: '42.77' }]}
/>

whenToUse: Showing open/high/low/close price movement over time
Financial or trading dashboards needing per-period range + direction
whenNotToUse: A single value trend — use LineChart

related.name: LineChart
related.reason: Use when only the closing price trend matters

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img"; OHLC values are in the fallback table and tooltip.
